title: Jump to item from mirror column

posts.author: madrasaInfo (Madrasa Info)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

when clicking on an item in a mirror column a window pops up with the information which is very useful, there’s also a “in → (board) board” button, so when you click it, it should highlight the item in it’s board, like opening its updates, or just selecting it or putting its name in the search bar, just a little QOL thing

What are you trying to achieve

to not have to search the for the item i was looking at when wanting to see it in its board

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @madrasaInfo ,

You can try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards.

It allows you to add the same item to multiple boards, so you don’t need to use mirror columns and setup complex automations.

171920×960 213 KB

You can also add an Item References column that allows you to jump to the mirrored item with one-click directly instead of searching for it.

Feel free to reach out us at support@fortimus.co for a free demo.
